x-enumeration-literals.name: Check Issuance Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that records a check issued by the account holder into the positive pay system for verification.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Check Presentation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where a presented check is submitted for validation against the positive pay records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Verification Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that compares presented check details (amount, payee, serial number) against the positive pay file.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Exception Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that flags a payment for manual review because it does not match the positive pay records.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Approval Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that authorizes a payment despite discrepancies, following review procedures.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejection Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that blocks a payment automatically due to mismatch or suspected fraud.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Positive Pay File Upload Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action where the account holder uploads a file of issued checks or payment instructions for verification purposes.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Correction Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: An action that updates, corrects, or modifies check or payment records in the positive pay system.
